name: Karen Mok
description:
'''Karen Joy Morris''' ({{zh|c=莫文蔚|p=Mò Wénwèi|j=Mok6 Man4wai3}}; born 2 June 1970), better known as '''Karen Mok''', is a Hong Kong actress and singer. She is considered one of the leading East Asian pop singers and actresses with a career spanning three decades. Mok is the first female Hong Kong singer to win the [[Golden Melody Award]], and to date has won it three times. 

Mok has released [[Karen Mok discography|18 solo studio albums]], starred in over 50 movies, and has over 15 million followers on leading Chinese social media site [[Sina Weibo|Weibo]]. With the Lhasa concert during [[The Ultimate Karen Mok Show]] (2018–2021) she set the [[Guinness World Records|Guinness World Record]] for the Highest Altitude Mass-Attended Music Concert. In 2024, Mok was the first female singer to do a solo concert in [[Beijing National Stadium]], the Bird's Nest.. In 2025, Karen Mok teamed up with long-term collaborateurs, producers and musicians, Terry Chan, Araiz and James Lee to form the band "Karen Mok & The Masters" and released the first album in that new formation.
